waves.frame_eqs_str: a['rx']=((a['rx']+0.025)+(Math.sin(a['bass_att'])*0.025)); a['ry']=((a['ry']+0.025)+(Math.sin(a['treb_att'])*0.25)); a['rz']=(a['rz']+0.01); a['t1']=Math.sin(a['rx']); a['t2']=Math.cos(a['rx']); a['t3']=Math.sin(a['ry']); a['t4']=Math.cos(a['ry']); a['t5']=Math.sin(a['rz']); a['t6']=Math.cos(a['rz']);

init_eqs_str: a['vol_now'] = 0; a['redneg'] = 0; a['slowtime'] = 0; a['blueneg'] = 0; a['greenneg'] = 0; a['xy'] = 0; a['beat'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['vol_mean'] = 0; a['warp']=0; a['q1']=(Math.acos(-1)*2);
frame_eqs_str: a['warp']=0; a['slowtime']=(a['slowtime']+(a['beat']*a['time'])); a['vol_now']=((0.4*a['bass'])+(0.1*((a['bass_att']+a['treb'])+a['mid']))); a['vol_mean']=((Math.abs(equal(mod(a['frame'],50), 0))>0.00001)?((a['vol_mean']-(0.5*(a['vol_mean']-a['vol_now'])))):((0.1*((a['vol_mean']*9)+a['vol_now'])))); a['beat']=((Math.abs(above(a['vol_now'], (1.5*a['vol_mean'])))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['ob_r']=-0.6; a['ob_g']=Math.sin(a['time']); a['ob_b']=(Math.cos(a['time'])*sign(Math.cos(a['time']))); a['mv_r']=-0.2; a['mv_g']=Math.sin(a['slowtime']); a['mv_b']=(Math.cos(a['slowtime'])*sign(Math.cos(a['slowtime']))); a['redneg']=((Math.abs(below(a['mv_r'], 0))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['greenneg']=((Math.abs(below(a['mv_g'], 0))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['blueneg']=((Math.abs(below(a['mv_b'], 0))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['wave_r']=((Math.abs(a['redneg'])>0.00001)?(((Math.abs(bor(a['greenneg'], a['blueneg']))>0.00001)?(1):((1+a['mv_r'])))):(a['mv_r'])); a['wave_g']=((Math.abs(a['greenneg'])>0.00001)?(((Math.abs(equal((a['greenneg']+a['blueneg']), 2))>0.00001)?(1):((1+a['mv_g'])))):(a['mv_g'])); a['wave_b']=((Math.abs(a['blueneg'])>0.00001)?((1+a['mv_b'])):(a['mv_b'])); a['rot']=(0.01*Math.sin(a['slowtime'])); a['q2']=Math.sin((a['slowtime']+a['beat']));
